name: optcatalog_free_trail_runtime_state_storage
description: OptCatalog::FreeTrailRuntimeStateStorage releases trail runtime-state storage owned by turret and player runtime cleanup paths.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?FreeTrailRuntimeStateStorage@OptCatalog@@YIXPAX@Z at 0x4b1f90 still fails: 8 unmasked mismatches, 4 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 13 bytes, VC object symbol size 16 bytes.

Reviewed difference is imported free call spelling and unused return-register cleanup: original calls through the imported free pointer and clears eax after the void free, while current source emits a direct COFF relocation to free. The native smoke reaches the real helper through zTurret runtime shutdown and verifies the owning cleanup path completes.
